must_detect.matched_text:
Information-barrier (rào chắn thông tin) reminders: investment, IR, and operations teams must route inquiries via the wall-crossing process; the standard blackout calendar and FAQs remain on the intranet.
Supplier onboarding and banking confirmations must continue to use placeholder account strings (e.g., 000-TEST-ACCT-XX); do not attach scans of IDs or utility bills to ticketing systems.
All external notices are to be filed solely via the Saigon Securities Market portal and the VN Capital Markets Directorate gateways per our Disclosure Policy, after Legal sign-off.
Operational note on “commercial terms”: procurement may use “term sheet” and “pricing grid” labels for vendor MoUs; these are not securities documents and carry no issuer disclosure implications.
Draft response to an exchange query about last week’s brief network outage is circulating internally and not yet posted on the market portal; treat as thông tin nội bộ until publication.
Preliminary, non-public discussions with GreenFlow Capital on an ESG-linked revolving facility continue; no amounts or rates are agreed, and no external communication is authorized.
Do not tip; only add colleagues to the insider list upon assignment and observe any blackout notices when circulated; breaches may trigger internal discipline under the Code of Conduct.
